publications.name: Counterfactual Simulatability of LLM Explanations for Generation Tasks
publications.summary: Extended counterfactual simulatability, a framework to evaluate explanation quality, to LLMs for two generation tasks: news summarization and medical suggestion. Our proposed method measures how well an explanation allows human users to accurately infer the model's output on unseen but related counterfactual inputs.

publications.name: Detecting Cultural Differences in News Video Thumbnails via Computational Aesthetics
publications.publisher: Workshop @ International AAAI Conference on Web and Social Media (ICWSM 24)
publications.summary: We propose a two-step approach for detecting differences in the style of images across sources of differing cultural affinity, where images are first clustered into finer visual themes based on content before their aesthetic features are compared. We test this approach using YouTube thumbnails from U.S. and Chinese videos on COVID-19 and the Ukraine conflict.

publications.name: Die Grundlage der allgemeinen Relativitätstheorie
publications.summary: The publication of the theory of general relativity made him internationally famous. He was professor of physics at the universities of Zurich (1909–1911) and Prague (1911–1912), before he returned to ETH Zurich (1912–1914).
